description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, rounded head and long, dark brown hair that extends down the back. The doll has a pale complexion, large round eyes, a small nose, and a subtle mustache above a small mouth. It is dressed in a simple, sleeveless maroon dress with a white lace-up bodice and a flared skirt. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are short and straight, ending in dark shoes. The overall appearance is cartoonish and minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and exaggerated proportions.
description: A cartoonish doll with long dark brown hair, a maroon dress with a white lace-up bodice, and outstretched arms. The face features large eyes and a subtle mustache.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, lace-up bodice, outstretched arms, and both legs with shoes visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and volume of the hair, the profile of the face, and the side of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full expanse of the smooth, dark brown hair covering the back and the back of the dress and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's length, the profile of the face, and the side of the dress and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a sleeveless maroon dress with a flared skirt and a white lace-up bodice, reminiscent of simple European folk or peasant styles. The dress is plain with no visible patterns or embellishments.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, and the head facing forward. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with large open eyes, a small closed mouth, and a subtle mustache above the lips. There are no pronounced emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, dark brown hair that extends smoothly down the back, covering the entire rear of the head and upper body.
